prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含原理科）最低位次约 6579→6220→5547→8760→9635，2024 年因新高考选科分组（再选不限组位次后移），近两年持续后移，2025 年基准约 9635 名；本省物理类计划 2021 年 209 人，2022–2023 年 191 人，2024 年 205 人，2025 年 202 人；2026 年计划 217 人，较 2025 年扩招约 7.4%，扩招使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 39 名，近年排名稳定在 38–41 区间，学校层次稳中有升；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园霸凌事件，可能轻微影响报考心理；抖音热度总排名第 60 位（较热），有一定关注度；未见明显投档断档记录；信息与通信工程 A+、电子科学与技术 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、网络空间安全 A、机械工程 A-，共 5 个 A- 及以上学科，在电子信息领域实力顶尖，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类 2024 年评估为「高热推荐」，计算机类持续「推荐」，与西电优势学科高度契合，相关专业报考热度高；本省 2026 年总考生约 45.1 万人（较 2025 年总考生 46.2 万略降），物理类考生估算约 31.3 万人（较 2025 年 32.1 万减少约 2.5%），考生总数小幅下降。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 9635 名、2026 年扩招约 7.4%（使位次数字增大）、优势专业持续高热（使位次数字减小）、本省物理类考生小幅减少（使位次数字减小）等多因素，考虑专业热度与考生规模对竞争加剧的拉动作用，小幅下调位次；预测最低位次约 10034 名，区间 9534–10534 名。

- 通信工程（卓越班）

- 微电子科学与工程（正跃院士班）。

- 电子信息类（集成电路）
- 电子信息类（通信）

- 计算机类（网络安全）。

三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 9534–10534 名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（电子信息类各方向、计算机类），一档卓越班/院士班可作为冲刺（需位次明显优于区间上限），三档专业作为稳妥保底。西电在电子信息领 域学科实力顶尖，相关专业就业前景广阔，建议优先选择与 A+/A 学科对应的专业方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science) was approximately 6579→6220→5547→8760→9635. In 2024, due to the new Gaokao subject selection grouping (the group with no further subject requirements saw a ranking shift), the ranking has continued to decline in the past two years, with the 2025 baseline around 9635. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 209 in 2021, 191 in 2022–2023, 205 in 2024, and 202 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 217, an increase of about 7.4% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 39th, with recent rankings stable in the 38–41 range, showing a steady rise in university level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus bullying incidents, which may slightly affect application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 60th overall (relatively hot), indicating a certain level of attention. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Cyberspace Security A, Mechanical Engineering A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating top strength in the electronic information field, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were evaluated as 'highly recommended' in 2024, Computer majors continue to be 'recommended', highly aligned with Xidian's advantageous disciplines, leading to high application popularity for related majors. The total number of provincial candidates in 2026 is about 451,000 (slightly down from 462,000 in 2025), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 313,000 (a decrease of about 2.5% from 321,000 in 2025), showing a slight decline in total candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 9635, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 7.4% (which increases the ranking number), the continued high popularity of advantageous majors (which decreases the ranking number), and the slight decrease in provincial Physics Category candidates (which decreases the ranking number), along with the driving effect of major popularity and candidate scale on intensified competition, the ranking is slightly lowered. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10034, with a range of 9534–10534.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology (Excellence Class)
- Communication Engineering (Excellence Class)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Experimental Class)
- Electronic Information Engineering (Tiejun Academician Class)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Zhengyue Academician Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits)

- Computer (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Engineering)

- Computer (Cybersecurity).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Automation (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science, Information Physics, Aerospace Information)
- Mathematics (Deep Integration of Mathematics, Statistics and Information, Computer Science)
- Biomedical Engineering (Electronic Information Cross-Disciplinary Integration)
- Management Science and Engineering (Digital and Business Intelligence Integration).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 9534–10534, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (various directions in Electronic Information, Computer) as the main target, Tier 1 Excellence Classes/Academician Classes can be used as a sprint (requiring a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. Xidian University has top-tier disciplinary strength in the electronic information field, with broad employment prospects for related majors. It is recommended to prioritize major directions corresponding to A+/A disciplines.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年历史类（含原文科）最低位次约 2806→2314→2493→2580，近年波动区间约 2314–2806，2025 年基准约 2580 名；本省历史类计划 2022–2026 年均为 5 人，计划连续 5 年持平，无扩缩招影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 39 名，对文科考生同样具备品牌吸引力；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，但主要涉及理工科相关事件，对历史类报考影响有限；抖音热度总排名第 60 位（较热），整体关注度一般；西电以电子信息为特色，历史类仅招工商管理类，与学校核心优势学科关联较弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 工商管理类近年社会 热度分化观望，非热门专业方向；本省 2026 年历史类考生估算约 13.8 万人（较 2025 年 14.1 万略降），考生总数小幅下降。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2580 名、招生计划连续持平、历史类考生小幅减少（竞争略缓解）等因素，考虑考生总数下降对竞争缓解的微弱作用，小幅上调位次；预测最低位次约 2600 名，区间 2210–2990 名。

一档（最难进）
- 工商管理类（数字化企业管理与数字化金融融合培养）（含工商管理、金融学、财务管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 历史类仅招工商管理类一个大类（5 人），位次在预测区间 2210–2990 名内可尝试报考。该专业为管理类宽口径培养，与西电信息技术背景结合有一定特色，但非学校核心优势领域，建议结合个人兴趣和职业规划综合考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 2806→2314→2493→2580, with recent fluctuation range about 2314–2806, and 2025 baseline about 2580th place; the provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2022 to 2026 is consistently 5 students, with the plan unchanged for 5 consecutive years, no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking in 2026 approximately 39th, also possessing brand appeal for liberal arts candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but mainly involves science and engineering related incidents, with limited impact on History Category applications; Douyin popularity total ranking 60th (relatively hot), overall attention moderate; Xidian is characterized by electronic information, History Category only enrolls Business Administration, which has weak correlation with the university's core advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Business Administration has seen divided social popularity in recent years, not a popular major direction; the estimated number of History Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 138,000 (slightly lower than 141,000 in 2025), with a small decrease in total candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2580th, enrollment plan consistently flat, and a slight decrease in History Category candidates (competition slightly eased), taking into account the weak effect of the decrease in total candidates on easing competition, slightly raise the ranking; predict minimum ranking about 2600th, range 2210–2990th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Business Administration (Digital Enterprise Management and Digital Finance Integrated Training) (including Business Administration, Finance, Financial Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category only enrolls one major category, Business Administration (5 students). Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 2210–2990 can attempt to apply. This major is a broad management training, with some characteristics combined with Xidian's information technology background, but it is not the university's core advantage area. It is recommended to consider personal interests and career plans comprehensively.
